ambusher.name: Ambusher
ambusher.description: An ambush striker — boosts Stealth, Dexterity, and unarmored defense, and can sneak even while watched in its element.
ambusher.note: In its natural environment it can Sneak even while observed. (Its Stealth becomes master if it was already an expert.)

bully.name: Bully
bully.description: A battlefield bruiser that terrorizes and shoves foes, with strong Athletics, Intimidation, Strength, and Charisma.
bully.note: Its Athletics and Intimidation become master if they were already expert.

daredevil.name: Daredevil
daredevil.description: A nimble skirmisher that is hard to flank, with master Acrobatics, more Dexterity, and better unarmored defense.
daredevil.note: Gains Deny Advantage: it isn't off-guard to hidden, undetected, or flanking creatures unless their level is greater than yours.

racer.name: Racer
racer.description: A speedster — a +10-foot status bonus to one Speed, legendary Fortitude, and extra Constitution.
racer.note: Its Fortitude save becomes legendary. The +10-foot status bonus applies to one Speed of your choice (Land, Swim, or Fly).

tracker.name: Tracker
tracker.description: An expert tracker that pursues tracks at full Speed, with improved Survival and Wisdom.
tracker.note: It can move at full Speed while Tracking. (Its Survival becomes master if it was already an expert.)

wrecker.name: Wrecker
wrecker.description: A demolisher whose unarmed attacks crack objects, with master Athletics and more Strength.
wrecker.note: Its unarmed attacks ignore half an object's Hardness.
